problem id: 5e149421
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(4) XOR SHR(6)

examples:
  01010010 -> 00100001
  00001011 -> 10110000
  10011111 -> 11110010
  01100010 -> 00100001
  01111111 -> 11110001
  11011110 -> 11100011
  01001101 -> 11010001
  01000111 -> 01110001
  00110100 -> 01000000

query: 10001101
predicted answer: 11010010
